vocab.example: My grandfather and I used to take a leisurely stroll through the park every evening after dinner.
I often reminisce about the times I wandered through the countryside, exploring hidden trails.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (thường dùng để đối lập với không gian đi bộ ngày xưa)
vocab.example: Before the urban sprawl took over, there were plenty of open fields where we could walk for hours.
Walking outdoors allowed me to commune with nature and appreciate the changing seasons at a young age.
In that bygone era, children were much more active and spent most of their daylight hours outside.

vocab.meaning: khám phá tình cờ và thú vị
vocab.example: Every walk felt like an adventure that could lead to a serendipitous discovery, like a secret pond or a rare bird.

vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, going for long walks helped me develop a deep sense of curiosity about the world.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn phong cảnh đẹp mắt
vocab.example: We would often hike up the hill behind our house just to catch a glimpse of the scenic vista at sunset.

vocab.meaning: sự khám phá tự do, không bị gò bó
vocab.example: My childhood was defined by uninhibited exploration of the local woods and riverbanks.
Even as a child, I realized that a simple walk in the fresh air could rejuvenate my spirit after a long day at school.
